deployment_note: CartridgeRackIdSize is the byte count read from the cartridge FRU board-serial (rack id) region and written to the CPLD; EEPROM read, CPLD wN@, and readback rN all use it. Omit or set invalid to default to 13. Use 14–16 (or up to 64) when your FRU/CPLD contract requires a wider rack id; see bmc/README-hw-management-bmc-copy-cartridge-data.md.
